case_title: DRAPER, ALVIN DARYL VS LAM, KEVIN et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-08-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-01-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LAM, KEVIN LUXOR CAB CO
PLAINTIFF FILES DECLARATION STATING HE'S ADDING A NEW DEFENDANT TO CLAIM, AND THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT BEEN SERVED. REQUEST FOR A NEW TRIAL DATE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DRAPER, ALVIN DARYL AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, KEVIN LUXOR CAB CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAPER, ALVIN DARYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, KEVIN LUXOR CAB CO $855.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $915.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAPER, ALVIN DARYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, KEVIN LUXOR CAB CO $519.33 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $579.33, PRINCIPAL REPRESENTING 50% NEGLIENCE UNDER VEHICLE CODE 21654 & 22400 RE: APPELLANT AND VEHICLE CODE 21571 RE: RESPONDENT. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 28160 ON JULY 25, 2006 NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO LAM, KEVIN RETURNED TO COURT UNKNOWN/REFUSED.
